productDisplayName: Flying Machine Men Crown Purple T-shirt
description: Style NoteHeritage styling with a contemporary twist, this flying machine tee has a versatile appeal that you can style to match your mood. Pair this with your tried-and-true denims on a lazy weekend, or throw on a biker jacket to epitomise the brand's authentic cool. The brand's version of a graphic tee is stand-out material, simply because of the unique print that gives off a devil-may-care vibe to your off-duty staples. Roll up your denims and wear this piece with boat shoes (sockless) for a laid-back yet in-vogue look. Product DetailsPurple round neck T-shirt, has short sleeves and print on the chestMaterial and Care100% cotton Delicate machine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryHang dry in shadeWarm iron on reverseDo not iron on print or embroiderySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
